entity.summary: Seychelles-operated hybrid cryptocurrency exchange active since 2023, combining centralized trading, Web3 wallet connectivity, and multi-chain services under the Bitcointry brand.
entity.notes: Bitcointry's official whitepaper places exchange operations in Seychelles. The Google Play listing identifies Devcode Technology Ltd as the app developer, while the specific CoinGecko profile provides the same operator name and a Seychelles company address. January 1 remains a year-level launch placeholder.

events.title: Bitcointry exchange established
events.description: Bitcointry began operating as a cryptocurrency exchange in 2023.
events.notes: The reviewed independent profile establishes the year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bitcointry official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitcointry identity and active exchange interface.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bitcointry
evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference corroborates the Bitcointry identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitcointry
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile identifies Bitcointry as established in 2023 and provides the Devcode Technology Ltd Seychelles company address.

evidence.title: Bitcointry Whitepaper v3.0
evidence.notes: Official whitepaper states that the Bitcointry exchange operates in Seychelles.

evidence.title: Bitcointry app listing
evidence.notes: The official app-store listing identifies Devcode Technology Ltd as the Bitcointry application developer.
